## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I ran `flutter analyze` with no issues
- [ ] I ran `flutter test` and all tests pass
- [ ] The UI is responsive (tested on different screen sizes)
- [ ] I tested on both Android and iOS (or at least one, specify below)
- [ ] No hardcoded strings (using l10n if applicable)
- [ ] No sensitive data (keys, tokens) is exposed
